name: watchtower
description: Passive agent-supervision extension for Antigravity. Builds a relationship map of your codebase, detects connection breaks caused by AI agent edits, logs change history, refines vague prompts, and answers questions grounded in real project history.

commands.title: Watchtower: Scan Project / Toggle Passive Watching

watchtower.mistralApiKey.description: API key for the Mistral cloud API. Stored via VS Code SecretStorage when set through the 'Watchtower: Set Mistral API Key' command; this setting is a fallback for environments where SecretStorage isn't convenient.

watchtower.mistralModel.description: Mistral model name to use for reasoning calls (prompt refinement, chat answers, project summary).

watchtower.flagThreshold.description: How aggressively to flag potential connection breaks. 'strict' flags more, with more false positives. 'lenient' only flags high-confidence breaks.

watchtower.maxLogEntriesInPromptContext.description: Maximum number of change-log entries to include as context when refining a prompt or answering a chat question, to avoid token-wasteful over-stuffing.
